arts.ttl: Ruben Dias: “Last year we dominated Real Madrid”
arts.sum: The Portuguese center-back touched on several key topics, including Madrid’s injuries, Kylian Mbappé, and City’s hunger despite a poor season. Manchester City defender Ruben Dias addressed the media at the City Academy Stadium today, sharing his thoughts ahead of his side’s highly anticipated Champions League clash against Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid prepare for Manchester City with ‘total emergency’ in defence
arts.sum: An injury crisis means Carlo Ancelotti must get creative in the Champions League playoff against Manchester City Dani Carvajal, Antonio Rüdiger, David Alaba, Éder Militão and Marcelo were in the team photo before the Madrid derby at the Bernabéu on Saturday night. A seriously impressive defence, it was just a pity they weren’t playing. Instead, Marcelo was there so they could pay homage to the full-back, who won 25 trophies with the club, in the week he announced his retirement. The other four had come to join him and support their teammates. None were dressed in white; all are injured. All of which would be bad enough, but it was about to get worse. The following afternoon, having been named in the squad to travel to Manchester, the captain pulled out too. In the past fortnight Lucas Vázquez had missed visits to Valladolid and Leganés as a precaution but eventually he too fell, calling from home after Sunday’s training session to say something wasn’t right in his thigh. He was the backup, a midfielder at full-back, albeit one who has played there for so long now that it has become his default role. There have been 36 injuries at Madrid this season, 26 of them muscular. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti explains Real Madrid’s decision to boycott the Ballon d’Or gala
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Monday provided an insight into the reasoning behind the club’s call not to send representatives to last year’s Ballon d’Or gala. The…

arts.ttl: The Five Real Madrid Players That Need to Avoid a Yellow Card Against Manchester City
arts.sum: Five Real Madrid players, including Jude Bellingham, are in danger of suspension in the Champions League against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Preview: All you need to know ahead of Man City v Real Madrid
arts.sum: When they face each other in the UEFA Champions League this week, it will be the fourth successive season Manchester City and Real Madrid have met in the knockouts of Europe’s premier club competition. Football writer Ben Bloom analyses the key details as Manchester City prepare to face Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League for the fourth season in a row.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti defends Real's Ballon d'Or snub
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti maintains his side were right to boycott last year's Ballon d'Or after Vinicius Jr was beaten to the award by Manchester City's Rodri.
Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola challenges Jack Grealish to prove him wrong and cement a first-team place after his FA Cup performance against Leyton Orient.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti makes Champions League prediction ahead of Man City vs Real Madrid: ‘I’m convinced’
arts.sum: The first leg of the play-off-round tie between the two European heavyweights takes place at the Etihad Stadium on Tuesday
